data.title: GardePro Launches World's First 3,000ft (1km) Long Range Wireless Trail Camera, Breaking WiFi Distance Limits
data.description: In the latest update, it was reported that GardePro, a leading developer in outdoor smart monitoring solutions, has introduced the GardePro Link 1.0 Long-Range Wireless Trail Camera System, consisting of the Hub and R3 Pro trail camera. This cutting-edge system utilizes advanced 802.11ah long-range wireless technology to enhance monitoring capabilities.

data.title: Retired HK individual scammed $840K by 'crypto experts' thrice in 6 months with false promises of gains and recovery.
data.description: Police in Hong Kong reported that a retiree, aged 66, fell victim to fraudulent schemes three times within a span of six months. The swindlers, posing as "crypto investment experts," lured the victim with promises of quick profits and assistance in recouping previous losses.

Brent above 110 puts pressure on both inflation and growth. Even if inflation moves toward 2.25% to 2.5%, the question is whether that overshoot is large enough to prompt a policy response after recent undershoots.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich Hosts 43rd Annual Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting in Dallas, Advancing Global Rhinoplasty Education
data.description: Renowned plastic surgeon Dr. Rod J. Rohrich will be leading the 43rd Annual Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting from March 20 to 22, 2026, in Dallas. The event will showcase leading global experts in the field and will include live demonstrations along with practical surgical training sessions. The meeting, held in Dallas on March 21, 2026, will provide valuable insights and updates in rhinoplasty techniques, attracting a wide audience of medical professionals and enthusiasts.

data.title: Some malls thriving despite challenging retail climate; 25% showing growth in foot traffic and 15% increase in sales.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 3.6 billion individuals now having access to the internet. This means that nearly half of the world's population is connected online. The report also highlighted that 2.4 billion people are active users of social media platforms. The increasing connectivity has had significant implications for various aspects of society, including communication, business, and education. As technology continues to advance, it is expected that these numbers will continue to grow, further shaping the way people interact and engage with the world.

data.title: Bitcoin's mining difficulty drops by 7.7%, marking the second significant decrease in 2026 amidst growing AI data center competition.
data.description: The mining difficulty of Bitcoin recently experienced its second significant reduction in 2026. This adjustment will make it easier for miners to compete as they face increasing competition from AI data centers.

data.title: During March, Sunset Fishermen Celebrated 27 Years of Hospitality in Playa del Carmen
data.description: A popular beach resort in Playa del Carmen, Mexico, known as Sunset Fishermen Beach Resort and part of the Sunset World Group, marked its 27th anniversary on March 21, 2026. To celebrate this milestone, the resort organized a series of special activities for its members and guests throughout March. These activities included cocktail parties with birthday cake-cutting ceremonies and more, as part of the anniversary festivities.

data.title: WYBOT Unveils S3, Redefining Hands-Free Pool Cleaning
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, WYBOT, based in Lyon, France, introduced a cutting-edge technology incorporating revolutionary AI, self-cleaning, and 3D mapping capabilities on March 21, 2026. As a renowned leader in the realm of robotic pool solutions, WYBOT unveiled this industry-first innovation to the world.

data.title: One early Ethereum investor buys $19.5M worth of ETH, as BitMine's Tom Lee predicts end of "crypto winter."
data.description: This week, thomasg.eth, a prominent Ethereum whale, has been actively increasing his holdings by making a significant $19.5 million purchase of ETH. Simultaneously, Tom Lee from BitMine has declared the conclusion of the harsh market conditions known as “crypto winter.”
The ECB is expected to hold. With limited clarity on how the war will affect prices and growth, communication is likely to focus on scenarios and monitoring rather than firm guidance.

data.title: Sprinto Launches Autonomous Trust Platform--Moving Compliance From Automated to Autonomous
data.description: Over 3,000 companies have implemented trust in Sprinto, a platform that replaces human-directed automation with governed agents to ensure compliance. The platform was launched in San Francisco on March 21, 2026, and is known as the top GRC and compliance automation tool on the market.

data.title: SunnyFit Celebrates 4-Year Anniversary with “Year 4 Everyone” Challenge and Community Giveaway Event
data.description: A free fitness app called SunnyFit, created by Sunny Health & Fitness, is marking its fourth anniversary with the Year 4 Everyone Challenge & Giveaways Event happening between March 6 and March 26, 2026. This event is recognizing the app's expanding worldwide community, which now consists of nearly 500,000 users. It will feature various challenges, rewards, and prize giveaways for participants. The anniversary festivities will culminate in the Year 4 Everyone Livestream.

data.title: Ethereum whale thomasg.eth buys $19.5M in ETH, signals end of "crypto winter" per BitMine's Tom Lee.
data.description: Thomasg.eth, a prominent early Ethereum investor, has recently made a significant move by purchasing $19.5 million worth of ETH this week. This investment comes as Tom Lee from BitMine predicts the end of the bear market in the cryptocurrency industry, suggesting a potential shift in market sentiment.

data.title: Best Cooler for Ultimate Storability and Long Lasting Cold (2026): Coleman Snap N' Go Cooler Selected for Ultimate Storability and Long Lasting Cold by Consumer365
data.description: In a recent report published on March 21, 2026, Consumer365 analyzed products aimed at enhancing cold storage for outdoor activities like travel, camping, and recreational events. The Coleman Snap N' Go Cooler was highlighted as the top choice in the review. This recognition underscores the product's superiority in maintaining low temperatures efficiently.
Markets are pricing around 55 basis points. The open question is whether Lagarde supports that path or leans toward looking through the current energy price spike.

data.title: War in Iran causes oil supply disruption, leading car buyers to consider electric cars amid rising gas prices.
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran has severely impacted worldwide oil supplies, leading many individuals in the market for a new vehicle to seek alternatives to mitigate the effects of fluctuating gas prices.

data.title: Conflict in Iran exposes vulnerability of Strait of Hormuz, a 35-mile bottleneck crucial for oil. Demonstrates global economy's reliance on few key routes.
data.description: The global economy faces a significant risk due to its reliance on a small number of choke points, as highlighted by a recent incident where a choke point only 35 miles wide caused disruption. This event underscores the vulnerability of the global economy, emphasizing the need for diversification and resilience in the face of such challenges.

data.title: Vertical farms struggle vs. open fields. Once popular with VC, many shut down. Surviving firms cut back operations.
data.description: A decade ago, this sector was highly favored by venture capitalists. The industry faced a significant decline, resulting in the closure of numerous farms. Consequently, the remaining businesses have downsized their operations.

data.title: K-Pop in China faces hurdles as Japanese members miss concerts amid Tokyo-Beijing tension, experts say.
data.description: Recent concerts in China have seen Japanese members of certain K-pop groups missing, amid tensions between Tokyo and Beijing. Experts suggest this move is a result of the strained relationship between the two countries.

data.title: NEAR's price hits $1.32; resistance at $1.38 may spur rally to $1.46, with $1.28 support. Mixed signals noted.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently priced at $1.32 per token, and technical indicators are sending mixed signals. A significant resistance level is noted at $1.38, which could potentially spark a rally pushing the price up to $1.46. Conversely, there is a support level at $1.28, which helps mitigate downside risks.
